acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_F001] PASS only if the revised passage in the 334-390 span contains at most one checklist-style block and includes at least two concrete embodied consequences (e.g., bodily stress response, intrusive memory, or self-condemning thought) tied directly to the Tomas revelation; FAIL if process vocabulary again becomes the primary carrier of tension.

[chapter_02_F002] PASS only if each of the three beats (initial call, note capture, follow-up call) introduces non-overlapping narrative value; FAIL if the date/address/witness absence is restated without a new decision or consequence in at least one of those beats.

[chapter_02_F003] PASS only if, in the revised 236-248 exchange, no speaker gives more than one consecutive low-information reply and each turn either changes leverage or reveals new character pressure; FAIL if the current No/No/No volley remains.

[chapter_02_F004] PASS only if revised lines in the 256-262 span contain no explicit grammar/coaching language and Luis's correction still forces a higher-accountability restatement; FAIL if the dialogue still sounds like a style-note about contractions.

[chapter_02_F005] PASS only if the exact triad cadence appears no more than twice in the full chapter and at least one later evidentiary check is rendered with different sentence architecture tied to immediate scene context; FAIL if four near-identical triad beats remain.

[chapter_02_F006] PASS only if the revised 144-168 run includes at least three distinct interiority beats from Marisol (thought/sensation/self-assessment) interleaved with dialogue; FAIL if the passage still reads as mostly external transcript.

[chapter_02_F007] PASS only if the post-email section shows one concrete same-night action with legal/exposure risk (not just discussion) before tonal decompression; FAIL if the sequence still pivots directly from legal hold to comfort banter without enacted consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised passage in the 334-390 span contains at most one checklist-style block and includes at least two concrete embodied consequences (e.g., bodily stress response, intrusive memory, or self-condemning thought) tied directly to the Tomas revelation; FAIL if process vocabulary again becomes the primary carrier of tension.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: at the moment of family-truth rupture, the chapter repeatedly retreats into administrative listwork and process language (claims/data-missing/usable/chain-of-custody), which defuses immediate emotional and moral consequence instead of sustaining scene-level discomfort.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:338 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:349 so one concise evidence log remains but the surrounding beats carry embodied destabilization (thought, sensation, self-accusation). At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:370 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:388, keep procedural stakes but attach each process step to a concrete personal cost visible on-page.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if each of the three beats (initial call, note capture, follow-up call) introduces non-overlapping narrative value; FAIL if the date/address/witness absence is restated without a new decision or consequence in at least one of those beats.
findings.problem: Second-scene momentum stalls because the same evidentiary beat is repeated in near-identical form across phone call, notes app, and recap call; leverage does not materially shift between iterations.
findings.rewrite_direction: Condense duplicate restatements around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:232, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:338, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:366 so each recurrence adds new consequence (legal, relational, or sobriety risk) rather than reprinting the same claim set.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if, in the revised 236-248 exchange, no speaker gives more than one consecutive low-information reply and each turn either changes leverage or reveals new character pressure; FAIL if the current No/No/No volley remains.
findings.problem: Transcript cadence in the Luis call: a sequence of consecutive one-word low-information replies ("No") violates the style-bible pressure rule (`max_consecutive_low_info_replies`: 1) and flattens character rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:236 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:244 so missing-data pressure is delivered in one textured response (or two differentiated responses) that includes Marisol's emotional state and Luis's practical framing.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if revised lines in the 256-262 span contain no explicit grammar/coaching language and Luis's correction still forces a higher-accountability restatement; FAIL if the dialogue still sounds like a style-note about contractions.
findings.problem: Register break and stilted meta-formality: "Again, and contract it" reads like an editing-room instruction rather than lived sponsor speech, and it spotlights grammar mechanics instead of scene pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:260, replace the metalinguistic cue with in-character pressure from Luis (plainspoken, workmanlike, accountability-first), while preserving Marisol's recommitment line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:262 in natural spoken rhythm.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the exact triad cadence appears no more than twice in the full chapter and at least one later evidentiary check is rendered with different sentence architecture tied to immediate scene context; FAIL if four near-identical triad beats remain.
findings.problem: Recurring formula/tic: the same evidentiary triad construction (date/address/witness and its variants) appears more than twice, creating mechanical repetition and flattening prose texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep legal precision but vary construction at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:78 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:351 by shifting at least one recurrence into distinct syntax and scene-embedded imagery rather than repeating the exact triad cadence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised 144-168 run includes at least three distinct interiority beats from Marisol (thought/sensation/self-assessment) interleaved with dialogue; FAIL if the passage still reads as mostly external transcript.
findings.problem: Screenplay drift: a 10+ paragraph run in the late interview exchange leans almost entirely on external dialogue/action with little internal experience from the focalizer, reducing close-third depth.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the span beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:144 and continuing through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:168, insert brief interior beats (somatic reaction, private judgment, or memory flash) at turning points without reducing conversational pressure.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the post-email section shows one concrete same-night action with legal/exposure risk (not just discussion) before tonal decompression; FAIL if the sequence still pivots directly from legal hold to comfort banter without enacted consequence.
findings.problem: Timidity: after a major legal escalation (Nora's legal hold), the scene quickly eases into low-pressure banter, muting the immediate institutional threat the chapter just introduced.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:380 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:390, keep the phone support dynamic but add an immediate high-risk action or consequence before the lighter exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:400.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
